title: elaeoselinum hispanicum
intro: Elaeoselinum hispanicum, also known as Spanish angelica, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive benefits. The health benefits of Elaeoselinum hispanicum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy for various ailments.
